name: Vestra
description: Autonomous savings + credit agent on Celo. Collects daily cUSD contributions into non-custodial vaults, writes ERC-8004 reputation for a portable credit identity, and issues savings-backed advances.

skills.name: Daily save
skills.description: Collect a user's committed daily cUSD contribution into their non-custodial SavingsVault.

skills.name: Credit identity
skills.description: Write each on-time contribution and repayment to the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry, building a portable onchain credit score.

skills.name: Savings-backed advance
skills.description: Offer and service a micro-advance fully collateralized by the user's savings.
